PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?airDate WHERE {
  wd:Q6084 wdt:P361 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P577 ?airDate
}
ORDER BY DESC(?airDate)
LIMIT 1
